<p>Bhubaneswar/Baripada, Apr 14 (PTI): Over 100 students fell ill and one of them, a Class 5 student, died on Tuesday, two days after having a meal at a government-run tribal residential school in Odisha's Mayurbhanj district, following which Chief Minister Mohan Charan Mahi ordered a probe, officials said.</p><p>Officials said the students of the Kakabandha Ashram School complained of discomfort

### [UP: Tension in Kasganj, Agra and Lakhimpur Kheri on Ambedkar Jayanti](https://news.abplive.com/news/india/up-tension-in-kasganj-agra-and-lakhimpur-kheri-on-ambedkar-jayanti-1836504)
*ABP Live Hindi* - Apr 15, 00:45 IST

<p>Kasganj/Agra/Lakhimpur Kheri (UP), Apr 14 (PTI): Tension prevailed in Kasganj, Agra, Lakhimpur Kheri and Lucknow districts of Uttar Pradesh on Ambedkar Jayanti.</p><p> The situation became tense in Kasganj after a stone-pelting incident during a procession, while miscreants climbed Parshuram Chowk in Agra. ### [Faridabad transporter commits suicide, FIR against 8 for 'harassment'](https://news.abplive.com/news/india/faridabad-transporter-commits-suicide-fir-against-8-for-harassment-1836503)
*ABP Live Hindi* - Apr 15, 00:30 IST

<p>Faridabad, Apr 14 (PTI): A 42-year-old transporter allegedly committed suicide after consuming a poisonous substance, with his family accusing a group of people of harassment, police said on Tuesday.</p><p> The deceased has been identified as Chandra Prakash Sethi. ### [सीबीएसई की 10वीं कक्षा के परिणाम जल्द हो सकते हैं जारी, स्टूडेंट्स ऐसे देख पाएंगे रिज़ल्ट](https://www.bbc.com/hindi/articles/c2399m0gde4o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss)
*BBC Hindi* - Apr 14, 21:46 IST

बीते साल सीबीएसई ने 10वीं कक्षा के रिज़ल्ट 13 मई को घोषित किए थे. लेकिन मीडिया रिपोर्ट्स में दावा किया जा रहा है कि इस बार सीबीएसई एक महीना पहले ही 10वीं कक्षा के रिज़ल्ट घोषित कर सकता है. सीबीएसई की 10वीं कक्षा के परिणाम जल्द हो सकते हैं जारी, स्टूडेंट्स ऐसे देख पाएंगे रिज़ल्ट
